Operation 'mybusinessverifications.locations.fetchVerificationOptions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary entirely. data.current_description: Reports all eligible verification options for a location in a specific language.
data.summary_suggestion: Fetch available verification options for location
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all eligible verification methods available for a specific location in the requested language. Accepts a location identifier and language preference in the request. Returns a list of VerificationOption objects, each describing a verification method (e.g., postcard, email, phone) and the destination where verification will be sent. Helps merchants choose how to verify their business location.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks detail about inputs (location, language), outputs (list of VerificationOption objects), and the purpose context (helping merchants choose verification methods). Added specificity about request parameters, response structure, and business context for better AI agent interpretability.

Missing input/output details and domain context. Added explanation of what VoiceOfMerchant state represents, input requirements, response structure, and business significance for AI agents to understand when to use this operation.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve Voice of Merchant state for location
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current Voice of Merchant state for a location, which represents the merchant's verification and operational status. Accepts a location identifier as input. Returns a VoiceOfMerchantState object containing verification status, completion state, and other merchant-related metadata. This state indicates whether the merchant has completed required verification steps and their current standing.

message: Operation 'mybusinessverifications.locations.verifications.complete' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description explains when to use it but lacks clarity on inputs, outputs, and state transitions. Added summary, clarified input/output details, and explicitly stated the state change (PENDING to VERIFIED) for better AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Completes a `PENDING` verification. It is only necessary for non `AUTO` verification methods. `AUTO` verification request is instantly `VERIFIED` upon creation.
data.description_suggestion: Completes a pending verification for a location. Required only for non-AUTO verification methods (e.g., postcard, email, phone). AUTO verification methods are instantly verified upon creation and do not require this action. Accepts a verification identifier and completion details in the request. Returns a CompleteVerificationResponse with the updated verification status. Transitions the verification state from PENDING to VERIFIED.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description explains when to use it but lacks clarity on inputs, outputs, and state transitions. Added summary, clarified input/output details, and explicitly stated the state change (PENDING to VERIFIED) for better AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'mybusinessverifications.locations.verify' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing summary. Description is too brief and lacks input/output details and side effects. Added summary, specified request/response schemas, explained different verification method behaviors, and clarified the relationship to the complete operation for better AI agent workflow understanding.

data.current_description: Starts the verification process for a location.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates the verification process for a business location. Accepts a VerifyLocationRequest containing the location identifier, verification method (e.g., postcard, email, phone), and method-specific details. Returns a VerifyLocationResponse with the created verification object and its status. Creates a new verification record in PENDING or VERIFIED state depending on the verification method. AUTO methods complete instantly; other methods require subsequent completion via the complete operation.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is too brief and lacks input/output details and side effects. Added summary, specified request/response schemas, explained different verification method behaviors, and clarified the relationship to the complete operation for better AI agent workflow understanding.

data.current_description: List verifications of a location, ordered by create time.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all verifications for a specific location, ordered by creation time (newest first). Accepts a location identifier and optional pagination parameters (page size, page token) in the request. Returns a ListVerificationsResponse containing an array of Verification objects and a next page token for pagination. Includes verifications in all states (PENDING, VERIFIED, FAILED). Useful for tracking verification history and current status.
data.reasoning: Missing summary.
